privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Codex Mundi we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and what rights you have.
privacy.dataWeCollectDesc: When you browse Codex Mundi without logging in, we collect no personal data. We only store a language cookie (NEXT_LOCALE) to remember your language preference, and data in your browser's localStorage to remember you've seen the welcome screen. If you create an account, we collect: your email address, username, and encrypted password. You may optionally add an avatar and biography.
privacy.howWeUseDesc: Your email is used only for login. Your username is displayed next to your contributions. We do not share your data with third parties. We do not use analytics, trackers, or ads.
privacy.cookiesDesc: We use a single cookie: NEXT_LOCALE, to remember your language. When you log in, Supabase may add authentication cookies necessary for the site to function. You can block cookies from your browser settings, though some features may not work.
privacy.yourRightsDesc: You may request at any time: access to your data, rectification, deletion (right to be forgotten), and data export. To exercise your rights, write to carlosrebollar09@gmail.com.
privacy.thirdPartyDesc: Codex Mundi is hosted on Vercel. User data is stored on Supabase. Both providers comply with GDPR. We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, or any other tracking services.
privacy.changesDesc: We will notify any significant changes to this policy via a notice on the website.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using Codex Mundi, you agree to the following terms.
terms.contentNatureDesc: Codex Mundi is a neutral archive of human knowledge. It compiles information from multiple sources, including theories, hypotheses, myths, legends, and speculations. NOTHING written here should be taken as absolute truth. Each entry is classified according to its reality status. It is the reader's responsibility to critically evaluate the content.
terms.userConductDesc: Do not use Codex Mundi to: spread false information as verified fact, harass other users, violate copyright, or engage in illegal activities.
terms.contributionsDesc: By contributing content, you grant Codex Mundi a license to store, display, and distribute your contribution. You are responsible for ensuring your contribution does not infringe third-party rights.
terms.disclaimerDesc: Codex Mundi is not responsible for how users use the content. The archive is a reflection of human knowledge, not a source of absolute truth. The administrator reserves the right to moderate, edit, or delete content that violates these terms.
terms.terminationDesc: We may suspend accounts that violate these terms without prior notice.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.purpose: Codex Mundi is a personal non-profit project with educational, cultural, and knowledge preservation purposes.
legal.intellectualPropertyDesc: The project's source code is open. The archive content is offered under a Creative Commons BY-NC-SA 4.0 license, unless otherwise indicated. Trademarks and logos mentioned belong to their respective owners.

cookiesPolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPolicy.intro: Codex Mundi uses minimal and exclusively functional cookies.

items.name: sb-*-auth-token
items.purpose: Session authentication (only if you log in)

cookiesPolicy.consent: We do not need prior consent because we only use technical/functional cookies, which are exempt under the European ePrivacy directive.
cookiesPolicy.manage: You can manage or delete cookies from your browser settings.
